title: Free Eva Turn Based Flash Game PC
display_title: Free Eva Turn Based Flash Game PC
wikitext:
[]: Free Eva Turn Based Flash Game (PC)             Quote Post by MaximumMayhem » Thu Oct 08, 2009 1:34 am Hey guys & girls, I dont know if anyone has seen this before, but I just thought I'd share a pretty cool turn based Eva flash game. You can play as either NERV or the Angels and the goal is ofcourse to destroy the other team. As turns go by, you get additional units to bring into the fold. http://rapidshare.com/files/290149674/Eva_Angels_Game.zip It's pretty simple, but good fun. It would be awesome if someone made a 'current' version with better graphics. Enjoy ;)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Oct 09, 2009 10:33 am It's sorta fun, for a few plays a least. I like that the Nerv and Angel sides have to use entirely different strategies to win. Nerv units are either retardedly powerful tanks or annoying fire support, while angels have to use a lot more finesse with widely differentiated abilities to find success. I do wish that the game started out with a larger board and all the units available from the beginning rather than rationing them out. Having to wait until turn X to get unit Y puts a major constraint on the strategic options available. Even better would be the option to choose some combination of units from the available list rather than getting all of them in turn.

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Fri Oct 09, 2009 1:11 pm I used to play a version of this game years ago, but never managed to find it again. Thanks! It's not a masterpiece, but I like it.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Oct 09, 2009 1:28 pm Can't open it.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Oct 09, 2009 3:32 pm If it's a Flash game, why do we have to download it? =\

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Oct 09, 2009 3:37 pm For some reason it doesn't work. It said something about version of Windows not able to run it. Does it need an older version, because I have Vista and it can run some pretty ancient stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Oct 09, 2009 7:07 pm I downloaded it. It certainly isn't a Flash game, but it works just fine when running it in compatibility mode for Windows 98. The only problem is that I... don't... have any idea how to play.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Oct 10, 2009 12:32 am It's not that hard, NAveryW. use 'unit' to deploy your guy(s) each turn, then move and attack. each unit has a list of attacks with a set range and ammo. Angels have some weirder properties, so start with the Nerv side first and see what they do. Does anyone know what Kaworu does? The game ends before he appears every time I play, but when I set the magi against each other he almost always shows up... but it's too fast to see what he has available.

[]:             Quote Post by MaximumMayhem » Fri Oct 16, 2009 9:53 pm I agree NemZ , it would be great to see an improved version. As for Kaworu.. he only has 14 hit points, so can be obliterated in one hit, but as far as I know, his attack lets you possess and control any enemy unit so he is quite potent when used properly.

[]:             Quote Post by Darlig Ulv » Mon Jun 24, 2013 6:19 am Can someone upload the game again, its not available on that rapidshare link and I would like to play it again since my computer it was on crashed.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jun 24, 2013 9:41 am Back from 1996, uh? http://www.mediafire.com/download/qg9d14k2ucn3eu3/ANGELS.ZIP I can't even run it on this PC but I'm pretty much sure that this is the game discussed in this topic, it was featured in the 3rd Collector's Disc; I've also included the English manual, it's the ANGELSWE.WRI file, open it with notepad or some other text editor.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Fri Jul 19, 2013 12:21 am Ahh yeah! I remember this one! ... ... Can't open it in my PC anymore -_- Damn 64 bit system...

[]: Re: Free Eva Turn Based Flash Game (PC)             Quote Post by rainssong » Mon Dec 12, 2022 2:49 pm After 10 years I build a version executeable on win11 check my twitter
